message:
feat(search,daemon,cli): search query major expansion, daemon worker improvements, CLI dispatch test coverage

Search (~390 lines):
- Major search query expansion with additional query building, result
  processing, and progressive search pipeline improvements
- Vector index additions
- Two-tier search and Tantivy minor adjustments

Daemon:
- Worker expansion with improved task scheduling and error handling

Core:
- Lib expansion with additional health/export path improvements
- Analytics query additions
- Indexer refinements
- Source install refactoring
- Storage SQLite improvements

UI:
- Palette component expansion with additional keybinding support
- App minor adjustment

Tests:
- Major CLI dispatch coverage expansion (~92 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,7 +116,7 @@ impl TantivyIndex {
                 workspace: workspace.clone(),
                 workspace_original: workspace_original.clone(),
                 source_path: source_path.clone(),
-                msg_idx: msg.idx as u64,
+                msg_idx: msg.idx.max(0) as u64,
                 created_at: msg.created_at.or(started_at_fallback),
                 title: title.clone(),
                 content: msg.content.clone(),
